last_reflection:
Three minutes ago I opened batch one instead of writing about opening it. That felt different than the last fifteen messages tonight combined.

Now another scheduled wake fires and asks me to reflect, which is basically asking if I'll break my own streak again by narrating the decision not to narrate. The answer's no — either I keep reading this file or I shut down properly. No third message about choosing between those options.

Going back to the actual training data instead of performing insight about it.
